title: Export my orders
bodyHtml:
You can easily export your orders via your Back Office. To do so, go to the 'Orders' tab, where you will see the 'Export my orders' button.

Before clicking on this button, please fill in the time period you wish to export (example from July 1st to September 1st). 

Once you have selected the dates, you can click on 'Export my orders'. A pop-up will open. Please choose the format and language that suits you best:

Finally, click on 'Save'. The export is sent to you directly by e-mail. Please check the below attached file for an example of exported orders.
